operational_knowledge_units.title: Tipper Station model represents operator stations with standard and GLD station types
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide describes the Tipper Station model in the Sorter Sweeper Database as representing operator stations. It indicates two station categories are currently present: standard stations and GLD stations.
observed_evidence: Visible text: "Tipper Stations represent operator stations."
Visible text: "As of now we have our standard Stations and our GLD Stations."
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper Database Tipper Station Model. Tipper Stations represent operator stations. Current station types include standard stations and GLD stations.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Each tipper station has two tippers
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states a fixed relationship in the model: each station contains two tippers.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: In the Sorter Sweeper Database Tipper Station model, each station has 2 tippers.
